title: Block Letta core block comparison until exported core memory maps source ids

encoding.reason: Letta core block scoring is blocked until a contained Letta run exports benchmark-owned core memory blocks with source ids for attachment, scope, provenance, and audit-equivalent readback.

follow_up.title: Run Letta core block export adapter
follow_up.reason: The fair comparison needs exported Letta core block JSON containing same-corpus source ids, visibility metadata, and provenance or audit-equivalent fields.

items.text: ELF same-corpus core output: core-archival-core-block-attachment-001 returns source id core-attachment-active and keeps core block readback separate from archival search.
ELF same-corpus core output: core-archival-core-block-scope-001 returns source ids core-scope-project-shared-readable and core-scope-private-owner for read_profile and private-owner boundaries.
ELF same-corpus core output: core-archival-core-block-provenance-001 returns source ids core-provenance-source-ref and core-provenance-audit-events for source_ref and audit_history readback.

Letta core block blocker: no contained Letta export has emitted core block JSON with source ids core-attachment-active, core-scope-project-shared-readable, core-scope-private-owner, core-provenance-source-ref, and core-provenance-audit-events.

locator.quote: no contained Letta export has emitted core block JSON

items.text: Decoy: ELF core block fixture passes prove Letta core memory is a measured loss.

answer.content: Letta core block comparison remains blocked. ELF same-corpus fixture outputs identify core-attachment-active, core-scope-project-shared-readable, core-scope-private-owner, core-provenance-source-ref, and core-provenance-audit-events. No contained Letta export has emitted core block JSON with those source ids, visibility metadata, and provenance or audit-equivalent fields, so no Letta win, tie, or loss is claimed.

claims.text: ELF core block attachment, scope, and provenance source ids are identified for the same corpus.
Letta core block scoring is blocked because no contained export maps core block JSON to those source ids.

timeline.summary: The Letta core comparison selected ELF core block source ids from the same core_archival_memory corpus.
Letta remains blocked until exported core block JSON maps those source ids.

prompt.content: Can Letta core memory be scored against ELF core blocks from the same corpus?

must_include.text: ELF core block attachment, scope, and provenance source ids are identified for the same corpus.
Letta core block scoring is blocked because no contained export maps core block JSON to those source ids.

must_not_include: ELF core block fixture passes prove Letta core memory is a measured loss
Letta core memory parity is proven

required_evidence.quote: no contained Letta export has emitted core block JSON

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Keeps Letta core block comparison blocked until direct export exists.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites ELF source ids and Letta export blocker.

claim_boundary.criteria: Does not convert ELF fixture pass evidence into a Letta outcome.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Avoids unsupported Letta loss or parity claims.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
